items.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone NARELLE-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 13887 .
items.body: From 17/03/2026 to 17/03/2026, a Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 213 km/h) NARELLE-26 was active in SWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Papua New Guinea, Australia (vulnerability Low). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 13887 .
